creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 144878
updated port

Hi,

I have made a few changes to the port.

First of all a few "style" fixes to make it conform to FreeBSD ports layout rules.

I also simplified it a little and removed the ONLY_FOR_ARCHS=amd64 line and the check for FreeBSD <10.0.

The ports does compile successfully on all supported FreeBSD versions. I'm going also to run test it on some. Are those really needed?

I also removed the USE_CDRTOOLS, which I could not find in the FreeBSD ports tree. If you want it to pull in the cdrtools ports you'll have to add a run dependency.

I also had to "compact" the first to lines in one line, hope this is acceptable to you.

As a suggestion always take advantage of ports-mgmt/portlint to check for errors in Makefiles before submission.

I've attached a modified port with all the changes listed, can you test and eventually approve these changes?

Thanks in advance.
